zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注关键支撑争夺
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅整理，价格运行在2076附近，日内波动有限。由于现价低于20日均线2093一线，短线结构仍偏弱，市场多头动能不足，反弹持续性有待进一步确认。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持负值，说明空头动能尚未完全释放，短周期仍存在回调压力。不过24小时涨幅保持微升，表明低位承接力量开始出现，短线或进入震荡筑底阶段。

关键支撑位关注2068附近，若失守可能进一步测试2050区域；上方阻力集中在2090至2100区间，也是20日均线压制位置。只有有效突破2100，市场情绪才有机会转向偏多。 

交易策略方面，激进交易者可依托2068支撑尝试短线低吸，但需严格设置止损。稳健投资者建议等待站稳2093均线后再考虑顺势跟进，以防震荡行情中的假突破风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading just below the 20-day simple moving average at 2093.58, signaling that short-term momentum remains slightly bearish despite the modest 24-hour gain. Price action has stayed compressed between 2068 and 2077, reflecting indecision after recent downside pressure. The inability to reclaim the 2100 region suggests sellers are still active on rallies, while buyers appear willing to defend the area around 2065. This creates a narrow consolidation structure that may precede a stronger directional move.

The MACD reading at -9.64 indicates bearish momentum is still present, although the pace of decline may be stabilizing. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment relies more heavily on price structure and moving averages. Trading below the SMA(20) generally favors cautious positioning until a confirmed breakout occurs. If Ethereum can close decisively above 2095, momentum could shift toward recovery and attract additional short-term buying interest. Failure to achieve that may keep the market vulnerable to another retest of nearby support zones.

Immediate support is positioned around 2065, followed by a stronger defensive region near 2040 where buyers could attempt to re-enter aggressively. On the upside, resistance is visible at 2095 and then near 2125, which aligns with prior rejection levels. A sustained move above resistance would improve sentiment and potentially open the path toward the 2150 area. Conversely, a breakdown below 2040 could accelerate bearish pressure and expose Ethereum to deeper retracement risk in the near term.

For active traders, a cautious range-trading strategy may remain appropriate while price stays trapped between support and resistance. Bullish setups become more attractive only after confirmation above 2095 with stronger volume and follow-through candles. Short-term bearish positions may still hold an advantage beneath the moving average, particularly if momentum weakens further. Risk management remains essential, as the current tight consolidation environment can quickly transition into higher volatility and sharp directional swings.
